nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 朗多尼亚州
nodes.summary: 朗多尼亚州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括Red-throated piping guan、肉垂鳳冠雉、Blue-necked jacamar等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 圣马丁大区
nodes.summary: 圣马丁大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括茶腹隐蜂鸟、灰颏隐蜂鸟、皇领蜂鸟等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Sulphur-bellied tyrant-manakin
nodes.summary: Sulphur-bellied tyrant-manakin（Sulphur-bellied tyrant-manakin，学名 Neopelma sulphureiventer），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜盆地
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联130种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、小嘴穴䳍、绿翅雁等130种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 秘鲁

nodes.name: 亚马孙州 (巴西)

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 巴西

nodes.name: 玻利維亞

nodes.name: Carl Eduard Hellmayr
nodes.summary: Carl Eduard Hellmayr是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括裸頸鸛、Checkered woodpecker、Dwarf tyrant-manakin等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 洛雷托大区
nodes.summary: 洛雷托大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括黑喉隐蜂鸟、皇领蜂鸟、黑白鷹鵰等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The sulphur-bellied tyrant-manakin (Neopelma sulphureiventer) is a species of bird in the family Pipridae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The sulphur-bellied tyrant-manakin is a bird of the far western Amazon Basin. One population separate from its main range is found in Peru's Loreto and San Martín departments

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The sulphur-bellied tyrant-manakin is a bird of the far western Amazon Basin. One population separate from its main range is found in Peru's Loreto and San Martín departments

links.label: 分布于

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: III | title =Birds of Peru | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =revised and updated |series=Princeton Field Guides | date =2010 | location =Princeton, NJ | pages =498 |isbn = 978-0691130231 }} From there it continues east into western Brazil's Acre, Amazonas, and Rondônia states. Its range also continues southeast through the northern half of Bolivia. There are also a few widely scattered records in other Brazilian states. The sulphur-bellied tyrant-manakin inhabits humid evergreen forest, especially along rivers with large thickets of bamboo. The separate population in Peru also inhabits semi-deciduous scrublands. In elevation in Peru it mostly occurs below but locally reaches . In Brazil it occurs below
